name: stashapp-api
description: Easy to use adapter for interaction with a Stash server through GraphQL.

scripts.generate: dotenv -- bash -c 'genql --endpoint $STASH_ENDPOINT/graphql -H "ApiKey:$STASH_API_KEY" --output ./src/generated -S Time:string -S Timestamp:string -S Int64:string -S Any:any "-S Map:Record<string, unknown>" "-S BoolMap:Record<string, boolean>" "-S PluginConfigMap:Record<string, unknown>" -S Upload:File --sort' && node fix-imports.js
scripts.refresh: npm run schema:snapshot && npm run build
scripts.publish:patch: npm run version:patch && npm install && npm publish
scripts.publish:minor: npm run version:minor && npm install && npm publish
scripts.publish:major: npm run version:major && npm install && npm publish
